title: Local DB bug fix + key columns + schema versioning
goal: Fix getNonDuplicates WHERE clause bug, introduce schema versioning and migration infrastructure, add itemKey/itemKey2 columns for stable Zotero item key storage.
in_scope: Fix getNonDuplicates WHERE clause composition bug (regression test first)
Add schemaVersion table and migration infrastructure to SQLiteDB base class
Define migration v0->v1: add itemKey/itemKey2 TEXT columns (nullable), add libraryID index
Extend insertNonDuplicatePair/insertNonDuplicatePairs to resolve and store item keys at write time
Add backfillKeys() method for migrating existing data
Add getNonDuplicateKeys({ libraryID }) method returning { key1, key2 }[]
Wrap migration and backfill operations in executeTransaction
Tests: regression test for WHERE bug, migration tests, key resolution tests, backfill tests
out_of_scope: Changing runtime allNonDuplicates Set format (still uses itemID pairs)
acceptance: getNonDuplicates({ itemID: 5, libraryID: 1 }) produces WHERE (itemID = ? OR itemID2 = ?) AND libraryID = ? (regression test)
Fresh install creates schema version 1 with key columns
Upgrade from version 0 adds key columns and libraryID index without data loss
insertNonDuplicatePair(10, 20, 1) stores both itemIDs and item keys
backfillKeys() resolves keys for existing rows, deletes rows with missing items
Migration and backfill are wrapped in transactions
